svg.text: SF Pro / Roboto · Headline: 22-28pt W800 · Title: 14-16pt W600-700 · Body: 11-13pt W400
Cards: 14-16px radius, 0.5px #E4E7F2 border · Chips: 4-8px radius · Progress: 4-8px height · Avatars: circular, gradient fill
390×844pt (iPhone 14) · 32px phone frame radius · 16px content padding · Bottom Nav: 54pt
Bottom Nav: Home | Play | Lessons | Analytics · Push: GM Selection → Sparring → Post-Game · Push: Lessons → Lesson Detail
1. Open Figma → File → Import (or drag-drop this SVG)
2. Each phone frame imports as a group — rename to screen name
3. Use Figma's "Create Component" to convert each screen
4. Add Figma Prototype connections following the flow arrows
5. Set frames to 390×844 for iPhone 14 device preview
Tip: Use "Ungroup" then re-group by screen for easier editing
Frontend: Flutter + Dart FFI + Stockfish C++
ML Service: FastAPI + BKT Engine + Scikit-Learn
4 GM Personas: Torre · Tal · Petrosian · Carlsen
